creator: runge@rostock.zgdv.de
text:
got a mail about fetch-problems for xlupe. Some weeks ago I sent a
change request, because the URL and Email of maintainer changed.
Seems, it got lost for that port...

Fix: 

Please replace all occurences of "http://www.rostock.zgdv.de/~runge/" with "http://core.de/~coto/", the rest of the URL stais the same. New email is runge@core.de
How-To-Repeat: Try to build x11/xlupe
